1 # This file contains common typos and their corrections separated by

1 # format is: three columns, separated by TAB:
1 # Corrections that consist of two or more parts are not split
1 # further in the preprocessor, because there is no way of knowing
1 # whether the token is a multipart expression or not.
1 # Beware of removing sentence delimiters (.!?) in correction, since
